data.name: Streaming ON! VTuber Training
data.detailed_description:
[故事].

在Yatube已成為強大娛樂產業的世界裡

主角在Yatube創業初期，成為發掘天才streamer的大獲成功的娛樂公司CEO。

他發掘了[BJ Gwangna, BJ Dog King, BJ Sikshin Yang, BJ Talgeo]等著名的streamer，並建立了世界領先的Yatube娛樂公司。

然而，有一天，謠言和對'BJ Shine'的性騷擾指控導致主角遭受重大挫折，最終他被董事會解除了 CEO 的職務。

然而，這一切都是董事會和 「BJ Shine 」為了讓他下台而使出的詭計。主角身無分文，無家可歸。

雖然遭到背叛，但一直保護和支持streamer的主角，仍然有相信他的人。

其中，一位名叫「BJ Hanna」的菜鳥溪流玩家繼續相信主角，並在他無家可歸的時候向他伸出援手。

被背叛深深傷害的主角，在 BJ Hannah 的溫暖笑容與支持鼓勵下，決定再次嘗試登頂。

主角和 BJ Hanna 一起開了一家娛樂公司，白手起家。

[玩法].

您選擇的動作會造成一定時間的流逝。

一天分為上午、下午和晚上。

您可以透過管理 BJ Hannah 的健康、美容等等來成長。

如果您缺錢，可以透過打工賺錢。

您可以用這些錢來購買更好的設備，以吸引更多的觀眾。

招募更多觀眾，贏得「紅鑽按鈕」獎牌。

[遊戲特色].

共有 8 個多重結局。

結局由情況或 Hannah 的健康等級觸發。

每個結局都包含一個 H 场景。

女主角有完整的日語配音。

data.short_description: 主角是 YouTube 娛樂公司的成功執行長。有一天，他因為一場陰謀而被趕出公司，變得身無分文。 女主角BJ Hanna出現在他面前，給予他再次嘗試的勇氣，兩人一起從頭開始。 根據你與她的關係，你會看到不同的結局。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Window10/11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Streaming ON! VTuber Training
data.detailed_description:
[Story]

In a world where Yatube has become a powerful entertainment industry

The protagonist starts a Yatube business in the early days and becomes the CEO of a hugely successful entertainment company that discovers talented streamers.

He discovers famous streamers such as [BJ Gwangna, BJ Dog King, BJ Sikshin Yang, BJ Talgeo] and builds the world's leading YouTube entertainment company.

However, one day, rumors and sexual harassment allegations against 'BJ Shine Na' lead to a major setback for the protagonist, and he is eventually removed as CEO by the board of directors.

However, it was all a ploy by the board and BJ Shine Na to remove him from power. Left penniless, the protagonist becomes homeless.

Despite this betrayal, the protagonist, who has always protected and supported the streamer, still has people who believe in him.

Among them, a rookie streamer named 'BJ Hanna' continues to believe in the protagonist and reaches out to him when he becomes homeless.

Deeply hurt by the betrayal, the protagonist is encouraged by BJ Hannah's warm smile and support, and decides to try his hand at the top again.

Together, the protagonist and BJ Hanna start an entertainment company and start over from scratch.

[How to play].

The actions you choose will cause a certain amount of time to pass.

The day is divided into morning, afternoon, and evening.

You can grow by managing BJ Hannah's health, beauty, etc.

If you are short of money, you can earn money with part-time jobs.

You can use the money to buy better equipment to attract more viewers.

Recruit more viewers and earn the “Red Diamond Button” medal.

[game features].

The game consists of 8 multiple endings.

Endings are triggered by circumstances or Hannah's health levels.

Each ending contains an H-scene.

Full Japanese voice acting is available for the female protagonist.

Translated with (free version)

data.short_description: The protagonist is the successful CEO of a YouTube entertainment company. One day, due to a conspiracy, he is ousted from the company and becomes penniless. The female protagonist, BJ Hanna, appears before him, giving him the courage to try again, and together, they start over from the ground up.
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Window10/11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
